positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos_problem
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u31,negated_conjecture,
    in_other_country(james)).

cnf(u34,negated_conjecture,
    ~manager(james)).

cnf(u40,negated_conjecture,
    works_remotely(james)).

cnf(u49,axiom,
    ~appears_in_company(james)).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~lunch_at_home(X0) | works_remotely(X0)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    ~manager(X0) | ~works_remotely(X0)).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    employee(james)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    ~in_other_country(X0) | ~employee(X0) | works_remotely(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define lunch_in_building(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define schedules_meeting(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define goes_to_building(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
